scripts.dev: concurrently -n shared,backend,frontend -c cyan,green,magenta "npm run dev -w @tlhn/shared" "cargo run --manifest-path backend/Cargo.toml" "npm run dev -w @tlhn/frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @tlhn/shared && cargo build --manifest-path backend/Cargo.toml && npm run build -w @tlhn/frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @tlhn/shared && npm run typecheck -w @tlhn/frontend
scripts.test: npm run typecheck && cargo test --manifest-path backend/Cargo.toml
